goal: Establish foundational infrastructure and ML pipeline for NBA prediction model

stories.title: Which NBA stats features yield best XGBoost accuracy
stories.description: Research and analyze which NBA statistics features provide the best accuracy improvement for XGBoost model predictions
acceptance_criteria: Feature importance analysis completed and documented
Top 10 features identified and ranked by importance
Feature set recommendations provided with pros/cons
Expected accuracy impact assessed for each feature

stories.title: Timing decision for predictions
stories.description: Decide on the best time to generate predictions

stories.title: Model training pipeline
stories.description: Implement end-to-end model training pipeline with reproducible runs
acceptance_criteria: Pipeline runs end-to-end without manual intervention
Each run is versioned and reproducible

stories.title: Stale predictions shown after model refresh
stories.description: Predictions cache is not invalidated when the underlying model is refreshed
acceptance_criteria: Predictions cache invalidates on new model deployment
